Metadata.title: AKAL — Indigenous Peoples of the World
Metadata.description: AKAL — global reference platform on Indigenous Peoples and pastoralism: UN-style fact sheets, world map, rights observatory and opportunities. EN · FR · ES.

Layout.topbar: Global reference platform on Indigenous Peoples & pastoralism

Home.title: The living encyclopedia of the world's Indigenous Peoples
Home.sub: UN-style fact sheets, an interactive world map, and the first global hub dedicated to Indigenous pastoralism — built with communities, under Indigenous data sovereignty principles.
Home.latestSub: Curated news from UN mechanisms, regional bodies and Indigenous organizations.
Home.sliderNote: Illustrations. Community photographs will be added with Free, Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC).

Peoples.title: Peoples of the world
Peoples.lead: UN-style fact sheets: identity, demography, territory, livelihoods, legal recognition, threats and resilience. Population figures are ranges from multiple sources; self-identification prevails.

Map.title: Interactive world map
Map.lead: Approximate presence areas by people. Click a circle to open the fact sheet.
Map.note: For safety and data-sovereignty reasons, locations are deliberately approximate. Sacred sites and vulnerable communities are never mapped precisely.

Pastoralism.title: Indigenous pastoralism
Pastoralism.lead: The only global section linking Indigenous rights and pastoral livelihoods — mobility as a right, customary land tenure, and the green transition.
Pastoralism.iyrp: 2026 is the International Year of Rangelands and Pastoralists (IYRP), declared by the UN General Assembly.

Rights.title: Rights & advocacy observatory
Rights.lead: The international legal architecture protecting Indigenous Peoples, instrument by instrument.

News.title: News & analysis
News.lead: Curated updates with sources, plus in-depth articles.
News.agendaSub: Open calls, fellowships and forums for Indigenous peoples and youth — updated continuously.

Organizations.title: Indigenous organizations of the world
Organizations.lead: A global directory of Indigenous and pastoralist organizations, filterable by category and country.
Organizations.joinText: Indigenous, women's, youth and pastoralist organizations can request to be listed in the directory. Every request is reviewed before publication.
Organizations.ok: ✓ Request received. We will get back to you after review.
Organizations.err: Please provide an organization name and a valid email.

Resources.title: Resource library
Resources.lead: Reports, publications and key documents — with Traditional Knowledge labels and access levels.

About.title: About the platform
About.lead: Vision, governance, ethics and how to contribute.

Contribute.title: Contribute to AKAL
Contribute.lead: AKAL is built with communities. Suggest a correction, propose a people's fact sheet, help translate, or reach out — every contribution is reviewed by our team.
Contribute.name: Your name
Contribute.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your contribution (links, details…)
Contribute.ok: ✓ Thank you! Your contribution has been received. We will get back to you after review.
Contribute.err: Please provide your name, a valid email and a message.

Fiche.wip: This fact sheet is being documented with the communities concerned. Content shown is a working draft.
Fiche.translation: This fact sheet is not yet available in this language — showing the English version. Help us translate it.
Fiche.tk: Traditional Knowledge notice — some knowledge of this people is community-restricted and intentionally not published here, in line with CARE principles and community consent.
Fiche.sourcesText: IWGIA · UN DESA · ACHPR WGIP · community sources (under validation)

Footer.mission: An independent platform documenting the world's Indigenous Peoples with and for communities.
Footer.newsletterText: Monthly digest of peoples, rights and opportunities.
Footer.newsletterOk: ✓ Thank you! You are on the list.
